name: AssemblyResolver
summary: Assembly Resolver for the Rhino App Domain.

methods.name: AddSearchFile
methods.summary: Register another file with the Assembly Resolver. File must be a .NET assembly, so it should probably be a dll, rhp or exe.

params.name: file
params.doc: Path of file to include during Assembly Resolver events.

methods.name: AddSearchFolder
methods.summary: Register a custom folder with the Assembly Resolver. Folders will be searched recursively, so this could potentially be a very expensive operation. If at all possible, you should consider only registering individual files.

params.name: folder
params.doc: Path of folder to include during Assembly Resolver events.

properties.name: CurrentDomainAssemblyResolve
properties.summary: Standard resolver function used by Rhino in execution context. This is added to the Current AssemblyResolve.

properties.name: CurrentDomainReflectionOnlyAssemblyResolve
properties.summary: Standard resolver function used by Rhino in reflection-only context. This is added to the Current ReflectionOnlyAssemblyResolve.
